## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between FOSSA and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO, and programmatic experiments.](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [7 CWE articles ready for FOSSA review; 3 more to be completed by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Site map issues identified; only glossary URLs currently included](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [Plans to explore programmatic content generation for end-of-life data](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Decision to create a separate property for end-of-life content initially](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)

## Topics

### CWE Content Strategy

  - [7 CWE articles (1 pillar, 6 clusters) ready for FOSSA review](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Code snippets reviewed by software developer, only missing language labels](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Decision to complete 10 CWE articles total, then pause](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [Considering dedicated subfolder vs. blog for CWE content](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Jakub recommends subfolder for long-term SEO benefits if expanding to 15-20+ articles](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)

### Site Map Issues

  - [Current site map only includes glossary URLs](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [Potential impact on indexing and crawl efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
  - [Andy to prioritize fixing site map issues](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [Jakub to research best practices for site map creation without CMS](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)

### OWASP Page Improvements

  - [Some sections (e.g., "how FOSSA addresses issues") contain hallucinated content](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Andy to work on de-indexing problematic sections](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [Potential to use editorial process to improve and optimize content](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)

### Programmatic Content Generation

  - [Discussing strategy for registry pages: package name, vulnerabilities, end-of-life date, licenses](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
  - [Debating between separate properties vs. single domain with subfolders](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [Concerns about splitting search intent and potential keyword cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Decision to start with separate end-of-life property, can 301 redirect later if needed](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

### End-of-Life Content Experiment

  - [Jakub to create draft of data elements needed for end-of-life keywords](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
  - [Andy to review available data sources (public and FOSSA-specific)](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Goal to combine best available data with SEO requirements](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andy to review 7 CWE articles in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Begin building CWE content subfolder on the site](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Jakub to create draft of end-of-life content structure and data elements](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
  - [Andy to investigate FOSSA-specific data sources for end-of-life content](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Prioritize fixing site map issues and research best practices](https://fathom.video/share/3Unw1j3tP8y4SEqxeQPm2MssXPaysJep?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
